text:
Once upon a time, there was a little forest where animals lived happily. In the middle of the forest was a big, peaceful lake that shimmered like a dream. Every now and then, you could hear the happy laughter of birdsong.

In the forest lived a wise old owl named Oliver. Every morning, as dawn painted the sky with hues of pink and gold, Oliver would fly out from his perch in the oak tree to visit the lake.

On one clear day, as he perched on a gnarled branch overlooking the waters, an unexpected visitor appeared. It was a curious raccoon with bright eyes that twinkled like stars.

"Hello there!" the raccoon exclaimed. "I've never seen an owl like you. Ever since I saw you at the fountain, I've made it my little secret spot to soak my acorns!"

Oliver hooted softly. "That's quite a spot. I'm glad you enjoy it. Maybe you could visit more often?"
